title: RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies – Responsible Business Conduct) Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI has permitted NBFCs to waive or reduce charges for customers in disaster-affected areas. The key takeaway is that relief can be granted for up to one year.
The post RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies – Responsible Business Conduct) Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
